channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 12th April
item.description:
2 areas of dumped rubbish. Dumped rubbish at the entrance to Celandine Drive SE28 8EP ( wood and wardrobe parts dumped on pavement under street sign). Dumped rubbish in Celandine Drive on pavement near number 35 . Drive into Celandine Drive and follow road around the corner. Shopping trolley full of black sacks and house hold rubbish left on pavement.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Celandine Drive, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog fouling in the alleyway, 12th April
item.description:
Dog poos all over the alleyway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street not being properly cleaned (at all?), 12th April
item.description:
Various items keep floating from one side of the street to the other, for weeks now. Road sides off pavement are never cleaned. School street pots regularly used for beer cans and bottles and food containers (I could not add more pictures in a single report but I have plenty). If streets are being regularly cleaned, I would recommend checking the approach because it really doesn't look like, especially over the past couple of months. Thanks.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass all the way along the alleyway, 12th April
item.description:
Hello! There’s lots of broken glass all over the alleyway. Lots of kids will be using it tomorrow on the way to school!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Grosvenor Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal fly tipping happening every day, 12th April
item.description:
Illegal fly tipping happening every day, every hour.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Morley Avenue, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle Rest, 12th April
item.description:
One of the cycle park rails is missing and the other is no longer secure. I can lift it out of its mount.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead Common Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sofa dumped on balcony, 12th April
item.description:
Dumped sofa on balcony Spot is constantly used by tenants living on same balconey to dump their rubbish and recycling, this occurs almost daily!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, East Surrey Grove, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lidlel bag with several cans dumped on footpath, 12th April
item.description:
Early Sunday morning 12/4/26 Several cans of nitrous oxide, laughing gas, have been dumped on footpath between 3rd & 4th lamppost on path. Park in cal de sac near house 130 & TLC, walk up footpath beside No. 130, through metal barrier. Canisters are on the R/H side of path. Several cans, very heavy. This footpath is used by schools & mothers with young children. PLEASE TREAT AS URGENT. (For info: your ref 9261950 is for one box containing one canister of laughing gas is still awaiting pick up on green verge at the start of footpath 9/4/26). Thank you.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture has been dumped in front of our bins, 12th April
item.description:
The furniture has been there for almost a month

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Graces Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In this area there are always tons of rubish, 12th April
item.description:
In this area there are always tons of rubish. Some people drink alcohol in that area and throw rubish wherever. And it is constantly rubish everywhere. Use cctv and fine people throwing rubish or clean it more frequently please. It is really disgusting and embarasing to live like this.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The lights are so dim it’s basically pitch black, 12th April
item.description:
The past couple of months the streetlights have been very dim in this area and due to all the trees there’s barely any natural lighting so it’s quite unsafe at night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copperfield Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lights pole broken on William barefoot drive, 12th April
item.description:
The lamp post is broken for few weeks, the position is the post is a hazard for pedestrians

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): William Barefoot Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of big furniture, 12th April
item.description:
Sofas, mattresses and chairs

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrubland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping, 12th April
item.description:
I despair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hayling Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping I’m afraid, 12th April
item.description:
What the **** is wrong with everyone around here. ****s

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hayling Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin belonging to 28 Pellerin Rd now here attracting everyone’s waste, 12th April
item.description:
There is building work going on at 28 and do they moved their large bin to the green opposite. Now litter is overflowing into the grassy area. What a mess. :-(

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hayling Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car bodywork, 12th April
item.description:
Dumped bodywork

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constant rubbish on Earlswood Street, 12th April
item.description:
Constant rubbish in front of 8, 6, 4 and 2 Earlswood street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Earlswood Street, Greenwich

item.title: Mattress, clothes and travelling bag by the tree, 12th April
item.description:
The fly tip has been there for two weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Carlyle Road, Thamesmead, Greater London

item.title: Flytip, 12th April
